'''Mount Yoda''', originally called '''Mount Dagger''',<ref name="Declassified" /> was an enormous shield [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] that dated from the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of that [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] formation, billions of years in the past.

==Description==
The only major geological feature on Dagobah, Mount Dagger stood ten kilometers tall and towered over the jungle canopy and the fog bank that shrouded the planet. A shield volcano, most of the shield had eroded away, leaving a craggy igneous spire that jutted above the [[Cloud/Legends|clouds]]. The hardened lava-interior remained intact and ripe for geological exploration and discovery. Small plants and lichens found no where else on the planet thrived in the soil around Mount Dagger.<ref name="NoP">''[[Nexus of Power]]''</ref>

It was named for [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] after the scholar [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] suggested it to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] set up a [[Defense Research and Planetary Assistance Center]] (also known as DRAPAC) on the mountain in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="Declassified" />
